subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Wronged One of the horizons unto 'Alí-Akbar, that he may rejoice through divine bounties and heavenly bestowals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این نامه ایست از مظلوم آفاق بعلی قبل اکبر تا بعنایات الهیه و فیوضات ربانیه مسرور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
